chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2419 of 2025 Criminal Bail Application No.2420 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail applications ------------------------- 29.01.2026 Mr. Abdul Aleem, advocate for applicants Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicants after arguing the matters at some length, does not press the captioned criminal bail applications and seeks direction to the trial Court to conclude the trial expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months. Learned A.P.G. does not oppose on such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail applications are dismissed as not pressed, however, learned trial Court concerned is directed to conclude the trial expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months under intimation to this Court through learned MIT-II. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
